title: 金鯱賞の後に・動けない、動かない

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Kawakami Princess completes the Kinko Sho.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Haaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She focused her entire body on emphasizing
beauty in her running form...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But to me, she looked uncomfortable and
constrained.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Huff... Wheeze... Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
(My body feels... sluggish. Was it always like this
after a race?)

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Way to go, Princess! That's our heroine!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Hey, give us another of your cool declarations!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Say you'll crush 'em all!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Um, but...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
(Words like those attack others, so I shouldn't use
them. They aren't what a queen should be saying.)

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ah... um...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
(Huh? How am I supposed to behave after a race
again?)

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
(Address my fans? But I'm not the only star here.
What would a queen do? Ummm...)

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
(What's something Princess Fighter would do in
this situation?)

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: (What should I... do?)

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ha... haha... Ehehe...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess lets out a forced laugh, but
her troubled expression makes it seem like she's
about to cry...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hold it!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
That laugh was super cringe! You're not acting
like yourself at all!

text_block_list.name: Staff Member
text_block_list.text:
What?! Hey, you can't come down here! Please
return to your seat immediately!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
No! I'm not moving! Not until Kawakami listens to
what I have to say!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Sweep...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Why are you making that face?! You're being
lame! You're acting super lame, Kawakami!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
What happened to all that talk about being true
to yourself and keeping your dignity?! 'Cause this
isn't...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
This isn't like you at all! You're not Kawakami
right now!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Give me the old Kawakami back! The Kawakami I
care about!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Wh-why must you say these selfish things?! I am a
princess, so I must conduct myself with dignity!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Wouldn't you hate it too?! If the winner of the
race is someone you can't respect, then...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Why should I care?! It doesn't make any
difference to me!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Well... even if it doesn't bother you... Other people might not feel the same...
choice_data_list: Can I talk to you for a moment?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
choice_data_list: Behaving with dignity is an admirable thing.
Behaving with dignity is an admirable thing.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
choice_data_list:
But I think being true to yourself is just as
admirable.

But I think being true to yourself is just as
admirable.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
So, you're saying both ways are right? Then...
how?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: What am I... supposed to do?
choice_data_list:
Think once more about what your ideal self
looks like.

Think once more about what your ideal self
looks like.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...My ideal self?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Well, I...

text_block_list.name: Staff Member
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Hurry up and clear out of here! We have
another race today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Shooed away by one of the staff members, we
leave the track.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'm entering the Victoria Mile, so make sure you
enter, too. And you better have your act together
by then.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'll tell you one thing right now. The Kawakami I
know would never sit back and take all this
dissing without doing anything about it.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: The Victoria Mile...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: No doubt she feels conflicted.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She doesn't understand the difference between
just being herself and being selfish, between
being dignified and holding herself back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's losing sight of how her ideal self—the
princess she wishes to become—should act.

text_block_list.name: Monitor
text_block_list.text:
Things are heating up at Chukyo Racecourse this
month! It will soon be time for the electrifying
spring contest—the Takamatsunomiya Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Monitor
text_block_list.text:
With the Umamusume who calls herself first-rate
entering the fray, who will become the queen of
the sprint?!

text_block_list.name: Monitor
text_block_list.text:
We'll also be holding a Princess Fighter event!
Parents who bring along their children will receive
free merch! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our next stop is the Victoria Mile, where I'm sure
Kawakami Princess will rediscover her ideal self.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As her trainer, I must guide her along the best
path.
